prs.title: glass-morphism
prs.body: # PR: Add Glass Morphism UI Enhancement ## Summary Implements modern glass morphism effects across the todo app for improved visual design. ## Changes - Added glass effects to main container, task items, and form elements - Supports all color themes with smooth transitions - Maintains accessibility and functionality ## Benefits - Modern, depth-enhanced UI - Better visual hierarchy - Maintains performance and responsiveness ## Testing ✅ All themes & devices ✅ Full functionality preserved ✅ Cross-browser compatible

issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT]
issues.body:
**Current Behavior**
There was no clear distinction between different project elements.

The overall section did not visually match the updated navbar or site theme.

**Proposed Enhancement**
Redesigned the Project Section layout to improve readability and visual appeal.

Added animated hover effects and smooth transitions to make project cards more interactive.

Implemented consistent typography and spacing for a balanced, professional appearance.

Updated the color scheme and shadows to align with the site’s dark theme.

Improved responsiveness so the layout adapts seamlessly to mobile and tablet devices.

Cleaned and refactored CSS for easier future updates.


**Expected Outcome**
A visually engaging and responsive Project Section that better highlights showcased work.

Improved user interaction and navigation through clear visual feedback.

Enhanced consistency with the overall site design, creating a unified user experience.

**Additional Context**
Built using React and CSS, following modern design and accessibility principles.

Enhancement focuses on interactivity, readability, and alignment with other redesigned components.

Future-ready structure to easily add new projects or animations.

issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT] Proposing a new cleaner design for navbar
issues.body:
**Current Behavior**

The previous navbar had a basic horizontal layout with uneven spacing between elements.

Active and hover states were not clearly defined, reducing user feedback.

The "Contact" button and logo lacked visual alignment and stylistic consistency.

Overall, the design felt outdated and did not match the rest of the site’s dark, modern aesthetic.

**Proposed Enhancement**

The navbar was redesigned and restructured to improve both visual appeal and usability.
Key changes include:

Layout Optimization: Reorganized element placement for better symmetry between logo, navigation links, and CTA.

Design Refresh: Introduced rounded corners, subtle shadows, and uniform padding for a polished look.

Color and Theme Update: Switched to a refined dark theme with improved contrast and a space-inspired tone.

Interactive Feedback: Added hover and active states for menu items and the “Contact” button to enhance user engagement.

Responsiveness: Ensured the navbar maintains structure and readability across all device sizes.

🧩 Code Refinement: Simplified CSS and improved component structure for easier maintenance and scalability.

**Expected Outcome**

A cleaner, modern, and cohesive navbar design consistent with the site’s theme.

Improved user navigation experience, with clearer interaction feedback.

Enhanced visual hierarchy making key sections (like “Contact” and “Nebula”) more noticeable.

Better alignment and spacing, improving readability and overall aesthetic appeal.

**Additional Context**

Implemented using React and CSS (no external frameworks).

Designed with scalability in mind — easily adaptable for future additions or dropdown expansions.

Enhancement inspired by UI/UX feedback focused on improving readability, balance, and interaction clarity.

issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT] Upgrade in design of Navba
issues.body: **Current Behavior** The previous navbar had a simple layout with limited styling and spacing inconsistencies. It lacked visual balance, clear active states, and modern design elements. **Proposed Enhancement** Redesigned the navbar layout and styling for better aesthetics and usability. Added rounded corners, improved alignment, refined hover/active states, and adopted a cohesive dark theme to match the site’s overall design. **Expected Outcome** The new navbar offers a cleaner, modern look with improved navigation clarity and visual consistency across all screen sizes. **Additional Context** Built using React and CSS, with responsive adjustments and subtle UI enhancements for a smoother user experience.
